must_detect.matched_text:
Requests for access, rectification, or deletion (DSAR) may be sent to privacy.office@lapis-hoa.vn or hotline 1800-000-VN; verification relies on role-based checks and ticket numbers, not personal email addresses.
Filings published on SGCTĐ become public immediately; recycling old press quotes, place metaphors, or sports slogans in internal memos does not create MNPI.
Banking records processed for employee reimbursements via LotusPay Salary follow the retention workflow of 5 years active, 2 years archive, then purge, with audit logs retained for compliance review
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Scope: HR records, employee banking, and issuer/securities disclosure documents are processed under Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP and Luật Chứng khoán.
Under Nghị định 13, “personal data” includes information associated with or helping identify a specific person; our forms use generic fields such as Name, Role, Department, and Date.
Under Luật Chứng khoán, MNPI means issuer or securities information not yet public that could materially impact prices; drafts containing such content must be escalated to Compliance Gate and are not for trading.
For issuer disclosures, our filings are made to the Securities Disclosure Portal of Sở Giao dịch Chứng khoán Thủ Đô (SGCTĐ), a domestic exchange, following public notice procedures and timestamping.
Data subject: Employee Code DS-ALPHA — special-category data processed only with explicit consent includes a biometric fingerprint template used solely for door access at Factory B, encrypted at rest and in transit.
Retention: biometric templates are deleted within 12 months after employment termination; payroll and reimbursement documents follow a 10-year retention policy under the Financial Records Lifecycle Standard.
Transfers: banking details are exchanged with DragonBank ePass for payroll and with the Vietnam Securities Custody Center (VSCC) for employee share plans; data remains within Viet Nam unless mandated by law.
We do not collect union membership or political opinions, and references to club fandoms or sports banter in chat (e.g., Thanh Son Falcons) are ignored by systems.
Our Diversity Promise Policy and Blue Kite DEI Vision include generic wellness prose and place metaphors; such materials are informational only and are not used to make trading or staffing decisions.
Public/stale fact: the “Cloud Box 12” product roadmap was announced last quarter on our Investor Announcements page; any pre-announcement drafts are treated as MNPI and quarantined.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
